name: Esports Marketing
description: Public esports homepage surface for a live matchday command product with a full-bleed broadcast hero, roster proof, telemetry, and cinematic conversion path.

directives: Render the public home page as a cinematic live matchday surface, not a generic SaaS marketing page.
Use the roster panel, telemetry strip, vertical update reel, and angular CTAs from esports-matchday-command/broadcast-home.
Keep the first viewport full-bleed and avoid nested cards, chip-heavy hero badges, mascot graphics, and bottom horizontal marquees.

page_briefs.home: Cinematic esports matchday command homepage. The first viewport is a full-bleed live broadcast stage, not a standard marketing hero. The headline should name a live matchup such as Team Vitality vs. r3Fraction, with a small VS tag integrated into the line flow and a white title gleam animation. Supporting copy explains live score, map control, player form, and coaching cues in one command view. Beneath it, a compact telemetry strip shows score, map, map-ban timer, comms, form, and momentum. The right third of desktop contains a liquid-glass 5v5 roster panel with circular avatars, a score row, and a vertical rolling update reel in the lower space. CTAs use angular cut/parallelogram buttons with live beacon iconography. Follow with free-form command-layer sections for pressure, replay evidence, and partner control rather than generic feature cards.

shells.immersive-stage: Flush top public shell with compact nav and a full-viewport gradient accent line. The route body is full-bleed and owns its first-viewport stage.
